Records.authors: Flieger, Wojciech, Henn, Johannes, Schreiber, Anders, Trnka, Jaroslav
Records.description: One-loop box with 4 internal masses $m_1..m_4$ in 4D embedding-space (dual-conformal) formalism. Coulomb-branch on-shell conditions $p_i^2=m_i^2+m_{i+1}^2$. Variables $u=(1+x^2)^2/(4x^2)$, $v=(1+y^2)^2/(4y^2)$; canonical pure basis of 4 masters.
Records.familyName: 4-mass one-loop 4-point box (Coulomb branch of N=4 sYM)

Records.description: Fully massive one-loop box with 4 distinct propagator masses and 6 external invariants (10 scales), computed to $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^2)$. Decomposed into 24 orthoschemes. Two types of square roots rationalized. First explicit MPL result at higher $\varepsilon$ orders for the generic massive box.
Records.familyName: fully massive 1-loop box (10 scales, higher eps)

Names: 4-mass one-loop 4-point box (Coulomb branch of N=4 sYM)
fully massive 1-loop box (10 scales, higher eps)
